source: Base categories from Model_idea.docx; expanded with explicit crosswalks for dissertation use and pipeline weak-labeling

categories.label: Virtualization
certifications: AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate (SAA-C03, via CTI-240)
categories.example_employer_language: Citrix VDI, Microsoft VDI, Virtual Desktop Infrastructure (VDI), VMware VDI (GDIT, Fort Liberty postings)
categories.note: Certifications corrected from guesses to real FTCC crosswalk data (2025SU_IT_CROSSWALK.pdf) -- CTI-240/241 align to AWS/Azure exams despite generic 'virtualization administration' course descriptions.

categories.label: Networking
categories.example_employer_language: Computer Networking, Computer Systems, Group Problem Solving, Network Systems (GDIT Network Administrator postings)

categories.label: Cloud Platforms (AWS/Azure)
certifications: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02, via CTI-141)
categories.example_employer_language: familiar with cloud technologies and principles, cloud-based environments (GDIT Cloud Service Operations Specialist posting)
categories.note: This category scored anomalously low (3.5/100) in the initial classifier run despite CTI-141 being a dedicated cloud course -- a small-N weak-labeling artifact from the OneVsRest classifier, not a real curriculum gap. Keyword list expanded here specifically to address it; rerun the pipeline and compare before trusting either number.

categories.label: Storage
categories.example_employer_language: Backup and Recovery (Software) (GDIT Systems Administrator postings)

categories.label: Security / Compliance
categories.example_employer_language: Secret/Top Secret security clearance requirement is itself the dominant local gatekeeping factor in this category (see Study Problem clearance finding) -- distinct from the technical competencies this category otherwise measures

categories.label: Scripting / Automation
categories.example_employer_language: shell scripting tasks, process control (NOS-125 course description; general automation language across GDIT IT Infrastructure postings)

categories.label: Monitoring & Troubleshooting
categories.example_employer_language: rapidly troubleshoot Tier-1 support issues, Troubleshooting (GDIT Cloud Service Operations Specialist and Systems Administrator postings)

categories.label: Hardware / Physical Infrastructure
categories.example_employer_language: Cable Technician roles listed alongside GDIT Fort Liberty IT Infrastructure and Operations postings -- indicates real, if separately titled, demand
categories.note: Weakest curriculum coverage of any category by course count (only NOS-110 touches physical hardware directly) -- a real candidate for the 'weakest categories' finding in the agent's gap report, independent of the small-N scoring artifact.

categories.label: ITIL / Business & Soft Skills
categories.example_employer_language: Good written and technical briefing skills -- can effectively communicate with teammates and leadership (GDIT Cloud Service Operations Specialist posting)
